/usr/bin/ar qc libimagecore.a CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/imagecore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/jpeg_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/jpeg_lossless.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/third_party/libjpeg-turbo/src/transupp.c.o" CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/png_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/webp_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/tiff_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/bmp_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/avif_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/codecs/heif_codec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/ops/exif.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/ops/resize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/ops/crop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/ops/rotate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imagecore.dir/src/ops/flip.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimagecore.a
